title: andropogon orthos
intro: Andropogon orthos, also known as black grama, is a type of perennial grass native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Andropogon orthos include reducing symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as aiding in wound healing and skin conditions. Andropogon orthos can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for topical application.
